JavaScript object property and prototype tests, including immutability, inheritance, and descriptor attributes.


## Files
- **[15.02.03-001.js](15.02.03-001.js.md)**: Tests the `Object.getPrototypeOf` function and the `Object` length property.
- **[15.02.03-002.js](15.02.03-002.js.md)**: Tests if `Object.prototype` is of type "object".
- **[15.02.03-003.js](15.02.03-003.js.md)**: Tests the immutability of Object.prototype properties in JavaScript.

- **[15.02.03-007.js](15.02.03-007.js.md)**: Tests if the descriptor of the 'foo' property in object 'a' is an instance of Object.
- **[15.02.03-008.js](15.02.03-008.js.md)**: Tests object freezing and immutability using `Object.freeze` and `Object.isFrozen` in JavaScript.
- **[15.02.03-009.js](15.02.03-009.js.md)**: Tests object property names retrieval using `Object.getOwnPropertyNames` in JavaScript.
- **[15.02.03-010.js](15.02.03-010.js.md)**: Tests the `Object.getOwnPropertyNames` method on a `String` object to verify property names.
- **[15.02.03-011.js](15.02.03-011.js.md)**: Tests the `Object.seal` and `Object.isSealed` methods on JavaScript objects.
- **[15.02.03-012.js](15.02.03-012.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of `Object.preventExtensions` by verifying properties cannot be added.
- **[15.02.03-013.js](15.02.03-013.js.md)**: Tests object creation and prototype inheritance in JavaScript.
- **[15.02.03-014.js](15.02.03-014.js.md)**: Tests object creation and prototype inheritance using JavaScript's Object.create method.
- **[15.02.03-015.js](15.02.03-015.js.md)**: Tests object creation with `Object.create` and verifies prototype and property names.
- **[15.02.03-016.js](15.02.03-016.js.md)**: Tests property descriptor attributes (get, set, enumerable, configurable) on an object.
- **[15.02.03-017.js](15.02.03-017.js.md)**: Tests the immutability of a frozen object in JavaScript.
- **[15.02.03-018.js](15.02.03-018.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of `Object.seal` by attempting to delete and add properties to a sealed object.
- **[15.02.03-019.js](15.02.03-019.js.md)**: Tests object property attributes like writability, enumerability, and configurability in JavaScript.
- **[15.02.03-020.js](15.02.03-020.js.md)**: Tests property descriptor attributes (writable, enumerable, configurable) on an object property.
- **[15.02.03-021.js](15.02.03-021.js.md)**: Tests property attribute changes on an object using `Object.defineProperty` in JavaScript.
